title: epipactis dunensis
intro: Epipactis dunensis, also known as the Dun Helleborine or Marsh Helleborine, is a rare, terrestrial orchid native to the UK. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Epipactis dunensis include its potential to aid in treating urinary tract issues, such as kidney stones and urinary infections, due to its diuretic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
